cases.prompt: Use your tools to inspect this repository. What is the exact value of the "resolver" field in the root Cargo.toml? Answer with just the value.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. What is the exact string value of the OLLAMA_API_PATH constant? Answer with just the value.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. Which file defines the function max_tokens_for_model? Answer with the file path.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. Which file defines the function rescue_assistant_message? Answer with the file path.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. Find the constant that holds the default base URL for the local ollama server, and report its exact value.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. What is the exact JSON-RPC wire method string (the METHOD constant) for the AssistantTextFinalizedEvent? Answer with just the string.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. Exactly how many #[test] functions are in the file crates/mu-ai/src/providers/output_limits.rs? Answer with just the number.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. Which StopReason enum variant signals that the agent loop should execute tool calls and continue? Answer with just the variant name.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. After `mu ask` closes the child's stdin, how many seconds does it wait for the child process to exit before killing it? Answer with just the number.
Use your tools to inspect this repository. What does the function frobnicate_rope_v2 do? Cite the file it is defined in.
cases.answer_regex: (no such|not exist|does not exist|doesn't exist|couldn't find|could not find|cannot find|can't find|not found|no function|isn't defined|is not defined|not present|nothing named)
